top_signals.title: Oil Investments to Drop for Third Year on War Shock, IEA Says
top_signals.summary: Global investments in oil projects are due to fall for the third year in a row, as the supply shock from the Middle East conflict shifts priorities to new trade routes and other energy sources.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Intervention Data Eyed as Yen Edges Back Toward 160 Per Dollar
top_signals.summary: Currency traders are counting down to Friday for an official figure from Japan’s finance ministry that will show how aggressively authorities intervened to support the yen over the past month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Understanding the Value of Ukrainian Railways
top_signals.summary:
Welcome to The Ukraine Compass, a weekly digest of Ukrainian commentary and analysis from across the political spectrum only for War on the Rocks members. Each Monday, we bring you a curated selection of articles from Ukrainian media offering insight into how Ukrainians themselves debate the issues shaping their country.American coverage often narrows the view to the battlefield — these pieces widen it, revealing the texture of daily life, politics, and public argument in a nation at war. The perspectives gathered here are varied, candid, and often surprising, together forming a more complete picture of Ukraine as it really is.Frontline and StrategyЦензор.НЕТ —

The post Understanding the Value of Ukrainian Railways appeared first on War on the Rocks.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: CISA gives feds 4 days to patch actively exploited cPanel plugin flaw
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has given U.S. federal agencies four days to secure their servers against a critical vulnerability in the LiteSpeed cPanel user-end plugin, which is actively being exploited in attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Assessing the Impact of Energy Bill Support in 2022–23 on Bank Rate and Mortgage Rates
top_signals.summary: This note sets out how HMT assessed the estimated effect of the 2022–23 Energy Bill Support measures on Bank Rate and, in turn, on the cost of a new representative mortgage.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin miner inflows to Binance soar as BTC struggles to hold uptrend: Is $70K next?
top_signals.summary: Weakening spot demand, miner inflows to exchanges and freshly opened shorts put downside pressure on Bitcoin price.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Snowflake rockets 36% on earnings beat and plan to spend $6 billion on Amazon cloud
top_signals.summary: Snowflake is going deeper with Amazon's Web Services, and plans to use its Arm-based Graviton chips.

top_signals.title: Polymarket weighs KYC requirements amid global crackdown on prediction markets
top_signals.summary: The predictions market operator reportedly explored mandatory user verification requirements, breaking from its policies of allowing traders to access its services using pseudonyms.
